SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.data.impl

Package com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.data.impl

package com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.data.impl
This package contains implementations for handling general data from the World Bank. Key classes: - Country: Represents a country. - DataElement: Represents a collection of World Bank data. - Indicator: Represents an indicator. - WorldBankData: Represents World Bank data. - ObjectFactory: Factory class for creating instances of the model classes. Annotations: - @XmlSchema: Defines the XML namespace and element form default for the package.
